case_title: MARGARET ROSE ANCHONDO VS. DR. EUGENE ROYTMAN, DDS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY ANCHONDO, MARGARET ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, DDS, DR. EUGENE DBA ALEGRO DENTAL GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHONDO, MARGARET ROSE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARGARET ROSE ANCHONDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DR. EUGENE ROYRMAN, DDS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE: WAIVED SERVED JUL-13-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, DDS, DR. EUGENE DBA ALEGRO DENTAL GROUP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANCHONDO, MARGARET ROSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROYTMAN, DDS, DR. EUGENE DBA ALEGRO DENTAL GROUP THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF OR THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT OF PLAINTIFF FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
